name: Heap
description: Monitor Heap product analytics platform for account access and availability compliance. Heap (now part of Contentsquare) provides digital analytics to understand user behavior.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Heap at https://heapanalytics.com/app
2. Go to Account > Manage > Privacy & Security
3. Note your Environment ID (App ID)
4. Generate an API key (or copy existing one)
5. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: Environment ID (App ID)
credentialFields.helpText: Your Heap Main Production environment ID. Found in Account > Manage > Privacy & Security.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Generate in Account > Manage > Privacy & Security. Admin access required.

credentialFields.label: Data Center Region
credentialFields.helpText: Select the region where your Heap data is stored. US is the default. EU is at eu.heapanalytics.com.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Heap account credentials are valid by authenticating with the API. Heap does not expose a team member listing API, so this check validates that the configured credentials have admin-level access.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies the Heap platform is accessible by authenticating against the Heap API endpoint
